channel.title: CyberNetSec - Industrial Control Systems
channel.description: Latest industrial control systems threat intelligence - the last 10 articles

item.title: 'SandViper' APT Hits Global Energy Sector with New 'DuneStalker' Espionage Malware
item.description:
A new report from Dragos Inc. details a sophisticated cyber-espionage campaign targeting the global energy sector by a previously unknown threat actor named 'SandViper'. The campaign, active since late 2025, focuses on oil and gas companies in the Middle East and Europe. SandViper uses a novel modul...

Severity: High

Categories: Threat Actor, Malware, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: Accenture Bets $4.175B on OT Security, Acquiring Dragos, runZero, and NetRise
item.description:
Accenture is making a monumental $4.175 billion investment to secure a leading position in the operational technology (OT) security market. The consulting giant is acquiring a majority stake in OT threat intelligence leader Dragos, while fully acquiring asset discovery firm runZero and firmware secu...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Industrial Control Systems, Policy and Compliance, Threat Intelligence

Read Full Article →

item.title: Teen Hackers Convicted in Transport for London (TfL) Cyber-Attack
item.description:
A group of teenagers has been convicted for carrying out a cyber-attack against Transport for London (TfL). The incident has raised serious concerns about the security of public transport systems and the effectiveness of intervention programs, as the individuals were already known to law enforcement...

Severity: High

Categories: Cyberattack, Industrial Control Systems, Threat Actor

Read Full Article →

item.title: German Defense Firm Atlas Elektronik Breached by 'TheGentlemen' Group
item.description:
Atlas Elektronik GmbH, a leading German provider of defense and maritime technology, has been listed as a victim by the threat actor group 'TheGentlemen.' The breach, reported on June 26, 2026, represents a significant cyberattack on a critical defense contractor, raising concerns about the potentia...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Data Breach, Threat Actor, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: Spanish Construction Giant Grupo Fonsán Hit by 'Booba' Threat Group
item.description:
Grupo Fonsán, a major construction and engineering holding group based in Spain, has been breached by a threat actor group known as 'Booba.' The security incident, reported on June 26, 2026, marks another significant attack on Spain's critical industrial sectors. The breach could expose sensitive da...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Threat Actor, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: FCC Adopts New Cybersecurity Rules to Safeguard Emergency Alert System (EAS)
item.description:
On June 25, 2026, the U.S. Federal Communications Commission (FCC) adopted new rules requiring operators of the Emergency Alert System (EAS) to implement specific cybersecurity measures to protect the critical public warning infrastructure. The rules mandate actions like installing firewalls, monito...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Policy and Compliance, Regulatory, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: CISA Mandates Urgent Patching for Actively Exploited Flaws in Lantronix and Ubiquiti Devices
item.description:
The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has added four critical vulnerabilities affecting Lantronix EDS5000 device servers and Ubiquiti UniFi OS to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog. The flaws, including a 9.8 CVSS command injection in Lantronix and a 10.0 CV...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Vulnerability, Threat Intelligence, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: Indian Automotive Giant Bajaj Auto Hit by Ransomware Attack
item.description:
Indian automotive manufacturer Bajaj Auto has reported a ransomware attack that affected its systems and a wholly-owned subsidiary on June 23, 2026. The company has contained the incident and notified CERT-In, but has not yet disclosed the extent of the damage or whether data was stolen. The attack ...

Severity: High

Categories: Ransomware, Cyberattack, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: Report: 60% of U.S. Manufacturers Hit by Email Breaches Amid Smart Factory Push
item.description:
A new report from Integris reveals that U.S. manufacturers are facing widespread cyber breaches as they accelerate their adoption of smart factory technologies. The survey found that a staggering 60% of manufacturing executives reported a significant email-based breach in the last year, and 49% expe...

Severity: Medium

Categories: Industrial Control Systems, Data Breach, Phishing

Read Full Article →

item.title: CISA Shifts Strategy to Protect 'Crown Jewels' of Critical Infrastructure
item.description:
The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) is shifting its strategy from a broad, sector-based approach to one that focuses on identifying and protecting the specific assets and systems—the 'crown jewels'—most critical to national security and public safety. Acting Director Nic...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Policy and Compliance, Regulatory, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →
